---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap');

:root {
  --bg: #0e0e0e;
  --surface: #161616;
  --border: #2a2a2a;
  --accent: #c8f04a;
  --accent2: #4af0c8;
  --text: #e8e8e8;
  --muted: #888;
}

body {
  background: var(--bg) !important;
  color: var(--text) !important;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif !important;
  font-weight: 300;
}

#quarto-content, .quarto-container, main {
  background: var(--bg) !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

.hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 6rem 4rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -200px; right: -200px;
  width: 600px; height: 600px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(200,240,74,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
  gap: 5rem;
  align-items: center;
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  width: 100%;
}

.hero-eyebrow {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.hero-eyebrow::before {
  content: '';
  display: inline-block;
  width: 2rem;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--accent);
}

.hero-name {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 4.5vw, 4rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  color: var(--text);
}

.hero-name em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.hero-desc {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 1rem;
  max-width: 440px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
}

.hero-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #0e0e0e !important;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  display: inline-block;
}

.btn-primary:hover {
  background: #d9ff5a;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.btn-ghost {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  color: var(--muted) !important;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  display: inline-block;
}

.btn-ghost:hover {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  color: var(--accent) !important;
}

.stack-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.stack-card {
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
}

.stack-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.stack-card.highlight { border-color: rgba(200,240,74,0.3); }

.stack-label {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}

.stack-name {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--text);
}

.stack-card.highlight .stack-name { color: var(--accent); }

/* PROYECTOS */
.section {
  padding: 5rem 4rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.section-inner {
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.section-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.section-num {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}

.section-title {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: 1.8rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--text);
}

.projects-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5rem;
}

.project-card {
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 2rem;
  transition: border-color 0.25s, transform 0.25s;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.project-card::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0;
  width: 0; height: 2px;
  background: var(--accent);
  transition: width 0.3s ease;
}

.project-card:hover::after { width: 100%; }
.project-card:hover {
  border-color: #3a3a3a;
  transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.project-cat {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  color: var(--accent2);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.project-title {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--text);
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.project-desc {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
}

.project-flow {
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 0.65rem 0.9rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.9;
}

.project-flow span { color: var(--accent); }

.tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
}

.tag {
  background: #1e1e1e;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 0.2rem 0.55rem;
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.coming-soon {
  opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ANIMACIONES */
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

.hero-left > * {
  animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease forwards;
  opacity: 0;
}
.hero-left > *:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
.hero-left > *:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
.hero-left > *:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.hero-left > *:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.45s; }

.stack-card {
  animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease forwards;
  opacity: 0;
}
.stack-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.stack-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
.stack-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.5s; }
.stack-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
.stack-card:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.7s; }
.stack-card:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.8s; }
</style>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">datos · automatizaciones · visualización</div>
      <div class="hero-name">Jimena<br><em>Fernández Moyano</em></div>
      <p class="hero-desc">
        Analista de Datos · Automatizaciones & Visualización.<br>
        Transformo datos en procesos automáticos, análisis y dashboards que tienen sentido.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-links">
        <a href="#proyectos" class="btn-primary">Ver proyectos</a>
        <a href="about.html" class="btn-ghost">CV & Publicaciones</a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jimena-fernandez-moyano/" target="_blank" class="btn-ghost">LinkedIn</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/jimefmoyano" target="_blank" class="btn-ghost">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="stack-grid">
      <div class="stack-card highlight">
        <div class="stack-label">lenguajes</div>
        <div class="stack-name">R · Python · SQL</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stack-card">
        <div class="stack-label">automatización</div>
        <div class="stack-name">Apps Script · Telegram API</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stack-card">
        <div class="stack-label">visualización</div>
        <div class="stack-name">Looker · Tableau · Shiny</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stack-card">
        <div class="stack-label">datos</div>
        <div class="stack-name">Google Sheets · BigQuery</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stack-card">
        <div class="stack-label">apps</div>
        <div class="stack-name">Shiny · Quarto</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stack-card">
        <div class="stack-label">código</div>
        <div class="stack-name">GitHub</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROYECTOS -->
<div class="section" id="proyectos">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="section-num">01</span>
      <span class="section-title">Proyectos</span>
    </div>

    <div class="projects-grid">

      <div class="project-card">
        <div style="margin-top:1.25rem;"><a href="proyectos/bot-telegram.html"           class="btn-ghost">→ Ver proyecto</a>
       </div>
        <div class="project-title">Bot de registro de alimentación y actividad</div>
        <p class="project-desc">
          Bot de Telegram con flujo conversacional para registrar comidas y actividad física.
          Las fotos se guardan en Drive y los datos en Google Sheets, con visualización en Looker Studio.
        </p>
        <div class="project-flow">
          <span>Telegram</span> → Apps Script → Drive<br>
          → Google Sheets → <span>Looker Studio</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Google Apps Script</span>
          <span class="tag">Telegram API</span>
          <span class="tag">Google Sheets</span>
          <span class="tag">Looker Studio</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card coming-soon">
        <div class="project-cat">análisis · R</div>
        <div class="project-title">Análisis en R — próximamente</div>
        <p class="project-desc">
          Proyectos de análisis de datos con R documentados en Quarto. Limpieza, modelado y visualización con código reproducible.
        </p>
        <div class="project-flow">
          <span>R · tidyverse</span> → Quarto → <span>GitHub Pages</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">R</span>
          <span class="tag">tidyverse</span>
          <span class="tag">ggplot2</span>
          <span class="tag">Quarto</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card coming-soon">
        <div class="project-cat">app · shiny</div>
        <div class="project-title">Shiny Apps — próximamente</div>
        <p class="project-desc">
          Aplicaciones interactivas en R/Shiny para exploración de datos con interfaz web.
        </p>
        <div class="project-flow">
          <span>R · Shiny</span> → <span>shinyapps.io</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">R</span>
          <span class="tag">Shiny</span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
